title: Hard-Liners in Iran Want to Keep Fighting America
summary_full: With much of their leadership killed in the war, Iran’s conservatives have sought to fill the void and intensify the fight against the United States.
summary_public: With much of their leadership killed in the war, Iran’s conservatives have sought to fill the void and intensify the fight against the United States.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: intensify the fight against the United States
